title: VanillaEnhanced+
description: Modpack that optimizes and improves your vanilla gameplay
body:
# VanillaEnhanced+
This modpack was created to improve vanilla gameplay.

## Perfomance
Sodium and its addons increase performance more than Optifine
## Optifine Features
Vanilla Enhanced support almost all optifine features, including shaders, connected textures and zoom.
## For builders
Allows use WorldEdit,creating and using schemes with Litematica, quickly changing blocks by type with ItemSwapper, and randomizing blocks.

![Build](https://i.ibb.co/D7rGymh/build.png)
## For Youtubers
ReplayMod which helps to make beautiful videos.

![Replay](https://i.ibb.co/tH09R2g/rec.png)
## For players
Allows communication in voice chat, seeing the contents of shulker boxes, avatars of players in chat

![Players](https://i.ibb.co/hZm1SSr/play.png)
